events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen song to hear his incredible solos?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves at 83! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star, or just make it shine brighter?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, began on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years since we lost The King. His music and legend live on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Remembered
angles.copy: 30 years ago today, the world lost a voice that defined a generation. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring legacy.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, 56 years on. His influence on music is still felt today. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Legacy
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles walked across that famous zebra crossing and released 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from this masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are as powerful as ever. What's your top Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Our Kid's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock and roll swagger. What's your favourite track he's sung?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' released 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 1, 1975.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon gave us 'Imagine'. A timeless anthem for peace and unity. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple's first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple launched the device that put 1,000 songs in your pocket and changed how we listen to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007 and all the iconic theme tunes that have accompanied him over the decades. What's your favourite Bond song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire. What's your favourite Lennon track?
